problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
